rows.notes: Clear reading. Page year header.
Clear reading. Page section header. Vertical lines unambiguous.

Description and amounts clearly legible. Pounds, shillings, and pence values are distinct and well-aligned within their respective columns. The '4' in pounds is slightly separated from '81' due to a slight writing gap, but clearly '481'. All values are in the valid range.
Clear reading. Section header for subscription entries.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings and pence are clearly '3' and '3'. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings and pence are clearly '1' and '3'. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings and pence are clearly '10' and '3'. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings and pence are clearly '5' and '5'. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings and pence are clearly '2' and '2'. All values in valid range.
Description 'Gorington' is clear. Pounds column is empty. Shillings '5' is clear. No pence amount recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings '10' is clear. No pence amount recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description. 'Socty' is a common abbreviation for 'Society'. No amounts.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings '5' is clear. No pence amount recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column is empty. Shillings '1' and pence '1' are clear. All values in valid range.
Description 'Fellows 8J Price' is the best interpretation of somewhat unclear handwriting for '8J Price'. Pounds '22' is clear. No shillings or pence recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. Pounds column has a dash, interpreted as empty. Shillings '7' and pence '6' are clear. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description and amounts. All values well-aligned and legible. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description. No pounds or shillings. Pence '2' is clear and well-aligned. All values in valid range.
Description clearly legible, including internal details '£.2 Tew.14. Kid.12'. Pounds '1' and shillings '15' are clear. No pence recorded. All values in valid range.
Description is clear. No amounts are present in the main columns; a faint note 'see other side' is visible, suggesting the amount might be elsewhere or zero.

Description includes sub-items with their own values which are not part of the main amount columns but are descriptive. Some £ symbols within the description text are very faint. Pounds '26' and shillings '11' are clearly legible and aligned. No pence recorded. All values in valid range.

Clear reading for description. 'Addl.' is read as 'Additional'. The numbers '5' and '10' are part of the description text. Shillings '15' is clear in the main column. No pounds or pence recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description. Pounds '100' is clear. No shillings or pence recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for description. Pounds column is empty. Shillings '10' is clear. No pence recorded. All values in valid range.
Clear reading for all total amounts. Values are well-aligned within their columns and underlined, indicating a final sum. All values in valid range.
